title: Presentation narratives from conversation transcripts
use_when: Presentation narratives from conversation transcripts. Use when the user needs a product workflow for presentation & communication related to presentation narratives from conversation transcripts. Trigger terms: presentations, storytelling, executive-communication, product-management, research-synthesis.
do_not_use_when: Do not use Presentation narratives from conversation transcripts when the request is mainly technical implementation, analytics modeling, or UX critique; route to the narrower Productize skill that owns that artifact instead. Do not use it when the user lacks enough context to distinguish facts, assumptions, and decision risk.
output_artifact: Presentation narratives from conversation transcripts stakeholder narrative with audience, message, risks, asks, and follow-up owner
framework_fit: Presentation narratives from conversation transcripts fits Stakeholder Communication work in the Align lifecycle when the user needs Presentation narratives from conversation transcripts stakeholder narrative with audience, message, risks, asks, and follow-up owner and has enough product context to make tradeoffs explicit. Use it to produce a decision-ready artifact, not a framework tour.
failure_modes: Produces Presentation narratives from conversation transcripts stakeholder narrative with audience, message, risks, asks, and follow-up owner without tying recommendations to the user's Align stage, evidence, and decision pressure.
Treats Presentation narratives from conversation transcripts as generic Stakeholder Communication advice instead of naming assumptions, missing inputs, risks, and the next validation step.
Fails to route away from Presentation narratives from conversation transcripts when another Productize skill owns the requested artifact more directly.

examples.prompt: Use $presentation-narratives-from-conversation-transcripts to turn this presentation context into a decision-ready Presentation narratives from conversation transcripts stakeholder narrative with audience, message, risks, asks, and follow-up owner.
